column1: "I like these dresses". - She says that she ________ these dresses.
"Don't be so rude" - She tells me___________so rude
"Buy some apples, please" - Mother _________me to buy some apples.
"I shall come to your party" - She says she_________ come to my party.
"Don't read the text, Tom' - The teacher________Tom not to read the text.
"I shall tell you everything" - He says he_______ tell me everything.
"Don't by any oranges" - My mother tells me____________any oranges.
"I always come here at five" - She says that _______always comes here at five.
" I often order take-away food." - She says she often________take-away food.
"I never lock the door." - Katy says she never __________the door.
" Don't switch on TV." - Jim tells me___________TV.
